app.name: Device Specs Viewer
app.tagline: Instant visibility into your device and browser capabilities.
language.label: Language
footer.note: Values shown are based on browser-exposed data. Some metrics may be unavailable.
debug.title: Debug Log
field.cpu.name: CPU Name
field.browser.name: Browser Name
help.overview.os.title: Operating System
help.overview.os.body: Estimated from the browser's user agent. Exact OS version may be hidden.
help.overview.cpu.title: CPU
help.overview.cpu.body: Exact CPU model is not exposed in browsers. Use logical threads for a rough signal.
help.cpu.threads.title: Logical Threads
help.cpu.threads.body: Logical processor count reported by the browser. Helpful for relative comparisons only.
help.memory.total.title: RAM Total (Approx)
help.memory.total.body: Derived from the Device Memory API buckets (e.g., 4, 8, 16 GiB). Not precise.
help.graphics.renderer.title: GPU Renderer
help.graphics.renderer.body: Reported by WebGL. Some browsers mask or limit this string for privacy.
help.network.summary.title: Network Summary
help.network.summary.body: Combines effective connection type and estimated downlink when available.
help.storage.summary.title: Storage Summary
help.storage.summary.body: Uses Storage Estimate API usage/quota when available. Values are approximate.
help.overview.network.title: Network Summary
help.overview.network.body: Combines effective connection type and estimated downlink when available.
help.overview.browser.title: Browser
help.overview.browser.body: Derived from user agent parsing. Version detection may be approximate.
help.system.osName.title: OS Name
help.system.osName.body: Derived from the user agent string. Exact OS version is not exposed.
help.system.osFamily.title: OS Family / Platform
help.system.osFamily.body: Broad OS family inferred from the user agent (Windows, macOS, Android, etc.).
help.system.timezone.title: Timezone
help.system.timezone.body: Resolved from the browser's locale settings. Should be accurate.
help.system.languages.title: Preferred Languages
help.system.languages.body: Reported by navigator.languages. Order reflects user preferences.
help.system.platform.title: Platform Data
help.system.platform.body: Browser-reported platform string. May be generalized or deprecated.
help.cpu.name.title: CPU Name
help.cpu.name.body: Exact CPU model is not available to normal web pages.
help.cpu.hints.title: Browser-Exposed CPU Info
help.cpu.hints.body: Currently only logical thread count is exposed. No model or frequency data.
help.memory.used.title: Used RAM
help.memory.used.body: Browsers do not expose used memory to web pages.
help.memory.free.title: Free RAM
help.memory.free.body: Browsers do not expose free memory to web pages.
help.graphics.vendor.title: GPU Vendor
help.graphics.vendor.body: Reported by WebGL. May be masked for privacy or security reasons.
help.graphics.vramTotal.title: VRAM Total
help.graphics.vramTotal.body: VRAM totals are not exposed in standard browsers.
help.graphics.vramUsed.title: VRAM Used
help.graphics.vramUsed.body: VRAM usage is not exposed in standard browsers.
help.graphics.vramFree.title: VRAM Free
help.graphics.vramFree.body: VRAM free capacity is not exposed in standard browsers.
help.network.status.title: Online Status
help.network.status.body: Based on navigator.onLine. Indicates connection status, not quality.
help.network.type.title: Effective Connection Type
help.network.type.body: Reported by the Network Information API (e.g., 4g). Not always available.
help.network.downlink.title: Downlink
help.network.downlink.body: Estimated downlink speed from Network Information API. Approximate only.
help.network.rtt.title: RTT
help.network.rtt.body: Estimated round-trip time from Network Information API. Approximate only.
help.browser.summary.title: Browser
help.browser.summary.body: Derived from user agent parsing. Version detection may be approximate.
help.browser.name.title: Browser Name
help.browser.name.body: Derived from user agent parsing. Some browsers may spoof identifiers.
help.browser.version.title: Browser Version
help.browser.version.body: Parsed from user agent string. Not guaranteed to be exact.
help.browser.userAgent.title: User Agent
help.browser.userAgent.body: Raw user agent string reported by the browser.
help.device.touch.title: Touch Support
help.device.touch.body: Based on maxTouchPoints. Indicates touch capability, not usage.
help.device.screen.title: Screen Resolution
help.device.screen.body: Physical screen resolution in CSS pixels. Not the viewport size.
help.device.viewport.title: Viewport Size
help.device.viewport.body: Visible page area in CSS pixels. Changes with window size and zoom.
help.device.dpr.title: Device Pixel Ratio
help.device.dpr.body: Ratio between physical pixels and CSS pixels. Used for high-DPI displays.
help.device.memory.title: Device Memory (Approx)
help.device.memory.body: Approximate memory bucket from Device Memory API. Not precise.
help.capabilities.webgl.title: WebGL
help.capabilities.webgl.body: Checks if WebGL is available in this browser.
help.capabilities.webgl2.title: WebGL 2
help.capabilities.webgl2.body: Checks if WebGL 2 is available in this browser.
help.capabilities.webgpu.title: WebGPU
help.capabilities.webgpu.body: Checks for WebGPU API support. May be gated by flags or policies.
help.capabilities.wasm.title: WebAssembly
help.capabilities.wasm.body: Checks if WebAssembly is supported by the browser.
help.capabilities.webrtc.title: WebRTC
help.capabilities.serviceWorker.title: Service Worker
help.capabilities.serviceWorker.body: Checks if service workers are supported and can be registered.
help.capabilities.localStorage.title: LocalStorage
help.capabilities.localStorage.body: Checks if LocalStorage is available and accessible.
help.capabilities.sessionStorage.title: SessionStorage
help.capabilities.sessionStorage.body: Checks if SessionStorage is available and accessible.
help.capabilities.indexeddb.title: IndexedDB
help.capabilities.indexeddb.body: Checks if IndexedDB is available in this browser.
help.capabilities.clipboard.title: Clipboard API
help.capabilities.clipboard.body: Checks if the Clipboard API is available (may require permissions).
help.capabilities.deviceMemory.title: Device Memory API
help.capabilities.deviceMemory.body: Checks if Device Memory API is exposed by the browser.
help.capabilities.hardwareConcurrency.bo: Checks if logical CPU thread count is exposed.
help.capabilities.networkInformation.bod: Checks if effective connection data is available.
help.capabilities.storageEstimate.title: Storage Estimate API
help.capabilities.storageEstimate.body: Checks if storage usage/quota can be estimated.
help.capabilities.touch.title: Touch Support
help.capabilities.touch.body: Checks if touch input is detected via maxTouchPoints.
help.capabilities.pwa.title: PWA Basic Signals
help.capabilities.pwa.body: Basic checks for service worker support and manifest presence.
help.storage.estimate.title: Storage Estimate
help.storage.estimate.body: Availability of navigator.storage.estimate(). Values are approximate.
help.storage.usage.title: Storage Usage
help.storage.usage.body: Estimated storage used by the browser origin. Approximate only.
help.storage.quota.title: Storage Quota
help.storage.quota.body: Estimated storage quota for this origin. Approximate only.
